finding: tasks import dry-run parsed a spurious task id `ATM-GOV-018` from the governance optimization v2 plan even though the actual cards are ATM-GOV-0182 through ATM-GOV-0195.
expectedBehavior: The plan importer should only emit real task-card ids and should reject or ignore partial id fragments that are not backed by a sibling task card or valid frontmatter.
evidenceOrRepro: `node atm.mjs tasks import --from C:\\Users\\User\\3KLife\\docs\\ai_atomic_framework\\governance-optimization\\end-to-end-auto-batch-performance-plan-v2.md --dry-run --cwd . --json` returned 13 tasks, including an `ATM-GOV-018` item with empty deliverables and status open.
followUp: Tighten task-id heading extraction to require full canonical ids, add regression coverage for numeric-prefix families such as ATM-GOV-0182/0183, and surface a warning that names the source line when a fragment is ignored.
